operational_knowledge_units.title: TipperStationDatabaseModel stores tipper station names
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that the TipperStationDatabaseModel table stores the name of the tipper station.
observed_evidence: “The TipperStationDatabaseModel table stores the name of the tipper station.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Robotics Database / Tipper: TipperStationDatabaseModel stores the name of the tipper station.

operational_knowledge_units.title: TipperDatabaseModel stores tipper location and routing identifiers
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The TipperDatabaseModel table contains the tipper location id and the entrance and exit ids associated with tippers.
observed_evidence: “The TipperDatabaseModel table contains all the location id of the tippers as well as the entrance and exit id's.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: TipperDatabaseModel contains tipper location ids plus entrance and exit ids for tippers.

operational_knowledge_units.title: TipperDatabaseModel includes TipperLoadType and GLD-specific prequeue identifiers
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The table includes TipperLoadType to distinguish GLD (gaylord) from standard tippers. GLDPreQueueEnteranceId and GLDPreQueueExitId provide entrance and exit ids for GLD and are not needed for standard tippers.
observed_evidence: “There is also a TipperLoadType to determine what kind of tipper. GLD (gaylord) or Standard normal tipper.”
“The GLDPreQueueEnteranceId and GLDPreQueueExitId are the enterance and exit id's for the GLD.”
“They can be ignored for the standard tippers.”

relationships.target: standard tippers for GLD prequeue fields

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: TipperDatabaseModel includes TipperLoadType to distinguish GLD/gaylord versus standard tippers. GLDPreQueueEnteranceId and GLDPreQueueExitId are GLD-specific entrance and exit ids and can be ignored for standard tippers.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Sorter Side Tipper Station table defines per-sorter-side tipper map and consideration sequence
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide describes a table that stores the mapping for each sorter side and the sequence in which tippers should be considered.
observed_evidence: “The Sorter Side Tipper Station table stores the map for each sorter side and the sequence in which it should consider tippers.”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Side Tipper Station table stores the map for each sorter side and the sequence used to consider tippers.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No explicit reusable procedure present on Tipper database slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide is a database reference describing tipper-related tables and fields, including GLD-specific fields and sorter-side mapping/sequence.
warnings: The slide describes table contents and applicability of fields but does not provide an explicit action sequence.
Do not infer database update, configuration, or troubleshooting steps from this slide alone.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as procedure candidate: slide 77 is a database/model reference for Tipper tables and routing sequence, not an explicit operational procedure.
